description: Vertical text card on a dark navy-blue background watermarked with a faint Department of Labor seal. The header reads 'NATIONAL' in large white serif caps with 'APPRENTICESHIP DAY' in smaller italic beneath. Several paragraphs of small white serif body text state that electrician Joshua Lira completed a five-year International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Registered Apprenticeship in four years, became an 'Ultimate Journeyman,' and works bending pipe and running circuits, and include the quote 'Going through the apprenticeship was the best choice I've ever made.' In the lower right is an inset photograph of Lira, a bearded man in a gray T-shirt and safety glasses, holding a flashlight near electrical equipment.
notable_text: NATIONAL APPRENTICESHIP DAY; Electrician Joshua Lira says he learns best by doing...; 'Going through the apprenticeship was the best choice I've ever made'
